top_signals.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
top_signals.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

top_signals.title: Vessel Attacks Force Hormuz Tanker U-Turns
top_signals.summary: At least four oil and gas tankers have turned back from attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz, ship-tracking data showed, as renewed attacks on vessels in the critical waterway heightened safety and security concerns.The diversions come…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The GitHub Actions Attack Pattern Your CI Security Scanners Miss
top_signals.summary: ActiveState explains how GitHub Actions attack chains can evade traditional CI security scanners, why passing a scan doesn't guarantee a secure pipeline, and how organizations can better govern their CI/CD workflows. [...]
